name: 2026-Website
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y mariadb-client && sleep 30 && mariadb -h mariadb -u root -proot -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS projects CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON projects.* TO 'root'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY 'root'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"
